name.en: Hydrangea the Shadow Flower Tea Master
name.ja: <ruby>花<rt>か</rt></ruby><ruby>牙<rt>げ</rt></ruby><ruby>点<rt>たて</rt></ruby>のアジサイ

requirement.en: During the turn you Normal Summoned this card.

effect.en: Excavate the top 5 cards of your Deck. You can add 1 excavated Level 7 Plant Type monster and/or 1 "Fusion" to your hand. Place the other cards on the bottom of your Deck in any order. If you added 2 cards to your hand by this effect, send 1 card from your hand to the Graveyard.
